title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Go First Cargo

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Go First Cargo
jsonLd.description:
Join the Go First Cargo family as a Logistics Manager in Raipur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Go First Cargo:
Go First Cargo is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Go First Cargo!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
